events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Richard Starkey, known professionally as Ringo Starr, was born on July 7, 1940, and gained worldwide fame as the drummer for The Beatles.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young! Ringo Starr, the rhythmic heartbeat of The Beatles, celebrates his birthday. What's your favourite Ringo moment or drum fill?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Sir Brian Harold May, born on July 19, 1947, is an English musician, astrophysicist, and the legendary lead guitarist of Queen.

angles.name: Guitar God & Astrophysicist
angles.copy: Happy 79th to the legendary Brian May! Guitar icon, songwriter, and astrophysicist – is there anything he can't do? What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Michael Philip Jagger, born on July 26, 1943, is an English singer, songwriter, and actor, best known as the lead vocalist and one of the founding members of The Rolling Stones.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday. The Rolling Stones frontman continues to defy age with his iconic stage presence. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: MTV, originally an initialism of Music Television, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the first music video aired.

angles.name: MTV's Big Debut
angles.copy: Remember when MTV actually played music videos? 45 years ago today, it all began with The Buggles. Did video really kill the radio star?

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut studio album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which quickly became the fastest-selling debut album in British history at the time.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's your standout track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. Which iconic performance do you wish you'd seen?

events.title: Elvis Presley would have been 91
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll,' passed away on August 16, 1977, and would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On the anniversary of his passing, we remember the one and only Elvis Presley, who would have been 91. His legacy as the King of Rock and Roll lives on.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, 30 years on
events.blurb: Iconic rapper Tupac Shakur tragically passed away on September 13, 1996, six days after a drive-by shooting in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Three decades since the music world lost Tupac Shakur. His impact on hip-hop and culture remains profound. What's your favourite Tupac track?

events.title: Jimi Hendrix would have been 84
events.blurb: Legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who tragically died on September 18, 1970, would have celebrated his 84th birthday this year.

angles.name: Guitar Genius Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 today. His revolutionary guitar playing continues to inspire generations. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album on September 26, 1969, which famously features the band crossing a zebra crossing outside EMI Studios.

angles.name: Iconic Album Cover
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road' and that legendary album cover. Still one of the most recognisable images in music history. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951, celebrating her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! The voice of The Pretenders, still rocking after all these years. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the distinctive voice of Oasis and a successful solo artist, celebrates his 54th birthday on September 21.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that unmistakable swagger to the stage. What's your favourite Liam vocal moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' album turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic album 'Imagine' was released in the UK on October 8, 1971, featuring his timeless anthem of peace and hope.

angles.name: Imagine's Message
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon released 'Imagine' in the UK. A powerful message of peace that still resonates today. What does the song mean to you?

events.title: Apple's first iPod was unveiled 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the revolutionary first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, promising '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changing music consumption forever.

angles.name: The iPod Era
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple introduced the first iPod. It put 1,000 songs in your pocket and completely changed how we listen to music. Did you have an original iPod?

events.title: It's James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the 1962 world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No'.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 007 and all things Bond. What's your favourite Bond film or iconic theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, the legendary co-founder of The Beatles and an iconic solo artist, was born on October 9, 1940, and would have been 86 this year.

angles.name: Lennon's Enduring Spirit
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace continue to inspire the world. What's your favourite Lennon lyric?
